name: VONNEGUT 4-11
subtitle: LITERARY COMPOSITION SYSTEM
heroImageAlt: Vonnegut 4-11 Literary Composition System — full system with all accessories
deck: The Vonnegut 4-11 is a dedicated literary composition system engineered for the production of long-form prose under conditions of sustained cognitive and emotional load.

components.name: INTEGRATED REJECTION
description: Automatically destroys unsolicited correspondence prior to operator exposure. Internal studies showed a 14% increase in daily word counts.

components.name: EXISTENTIAL REFLECTION
description: Tracks the passage of time without providing context.

components.name: ASHTRAY STABILIZATION
description: Designed to stabilize small metal objects.
Other applications are noted in field reports.

components.name: BOTANICAL MORALE
description: Temperature-controlled botanical support system. Operator refillable. 500 mL capacity.

components.name: EXTERNAL BI-DIRECTIONAL
description: Maintains operator posture during extended composition sessions.
Compatible with: Chin, Forehead, Left Temple, Right Temple.

historyLeft: Released in 1984, the Vonnegut 4-11 remains the best-selling machine in the history of the Literary Operations Division. Critics argued that the device encouraged unhealthy writing habits. Operators argued that it encouraged writing.

The 4-11 was developed in response to field research involving serious literary writers who reported that traditional writing environments did not adequately support the demands of long-form composition.
Early prototypes omitted the cranial support arm. Test subjects repeatedly attempted to install their own. The revision was adopted.
historyRight: The Vonnegut 4-11 has been used in the production of thousands of memoirs, essays, and unfinished manuscripts.

It is not a typewriter.
It is not a word processor.
It is a long-term literary survival system.
